outcome_summary: Sixth routine fire of the T-SEED-QA seed-graph QA census. Scored shard 06 — 27 pedagogical_prerequisite edges (C1) + 20 nodes (C2/C3) per the pinned seed_qa_audit.md rubric — and wrote seed_qa_evidence/shard_06.md. Findings: C1 0/27 defective = 0.0% (the census's second 0-defect shard after shard 04; 21 Sound, 6 Defensible); C2 0/20 fail; C3 1/20 fail = 5.0% (N-16 conditionalization, borderline jargon/notation-gated summary). Zero audit-touched edges — no shard-06 (source,target) pair matches the S-0122 follow-up migrations 0061-0065. The 6-Defensible count is a notable rise (shard 04 had 1, shard 05 had 4); each was re-checked and confirmed a genuine 'supportable on a citable alternative reading, not canonical' call rather than disguised uncertainty, but three (E-12 social_contract_theory->political_obligation, E-17 truth_conditional_semantics->compositionality, E-21 propositional_attitude->intentionality) share a could-be-reversed 'target is the more general/foundational concept' shape and are flagged prominently for the SQA-20 closeout's consistency review — the monotone-ish 1->4->6 rise across shards 04-06 is exactly the drift signal S-0165's audit-the-auditor was built to catch, named explicitly in the evidence file. Running C1 across shards 01-06: 10.7% / 3.6% / 3.6% / 0.0% / 3.7% / 0.0%, firmly under the production audit's 13% baseline. Candidate findings only; disposition is the SQA-20 closeout. SQA-06 marked complete; SQA-07 next. No in-band Issues. mempalace_zero_citations_after_search fires because the boot search surfaced 0 drawers above the 0.60 threshold — same benign shape every prior census shard saw; the diary entry and evidence file operate fully within the pinned methodology and reference S-0122/S-0165 prior context. 0 validator hard-fails (50 checks on --final-check).
